title: Swiggy is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Swiggy is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Swiggy in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
